rows.label: qev086606_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nice work out there. The Testament are
going over the parts as we speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0002
rows.name:
You'll let us know if
anything comes of it, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0003
rows.name: You got it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0004
rows.name:
I don't mind tellin' ya, I'm a bit surprised
your team found all the parts AND rescued
Iriina. Maybe surprised isn't the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0005
rows.name:
More like disappointed—in the other
teams. Those slackers have a few
thousand push-ups comin' to 'em![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0006
rows.name:
Don't be too hard on them—Doug
and Gwin both played a part
in the rescue operation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0007
rows.name:
If it wasn't for the two of them,
Iriina could've been in real trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0008
rows.name:
Doug? Okay, yes. Gwin?
Mmmaybe not so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0009
rows.name:
In any case, most of the credit is
yours, Elma. But what else is new.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0010
rows.name:
Been that way since
before we left Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0011
rows.name: Doug was saying the same thing earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0012
rows.name: You really are something, Elma![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev086606_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask about when Elma struck
back at the enemy on Earth.

rows.label: qev086606_JNK0020
rows.name: Correct

rows.label: qev086606_SEL0021
rows.name:
Remind everyone that
this was a TEAM effort.

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0013
rows.name: Hmm? Oh, that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you want to know a person's past,
give them cause to tell you about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0015
rows.name: Mo? What does Elma mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0016
rows.name:
It means Elma will tell us about
it when she's good and ready.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's different now, anyway. I
don't have to charge in alone
when I have a team like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0018
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0019
rows.name:
If my team's effective, it's
only because every single member
is pulling their weight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0020
rows.name:
Besides, it's going to take more than
just a handful of heroes to win the
war and cultivate this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0021
rows.name:
Ultimately, the responsibility and the
accolades all go back to the commander who
unifies and leads the entire operation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0022
rows.name: Well, I... That's...true...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0023
rows.name:
Which reminds me— why AREN'T
you BLADE commander, Elma?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yes! Yes! Mustache man can still
have gainful employment as
personal assistant to Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086606_MSG0025
rows.name: Hah! Not in THIS lifetime, potato skin![ST:wait ]
